CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100015626) FILED BY DEFENDANT BCBG MAX AZRIA GROUP, LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 30.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BCBG MAX AZRIA GROUP, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION AND TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF GARDENIA ZUNIGA-HAROS CLASS CLAIMS AND STAY ALL CIVIL COURT PROCEEDINGS PENDING THE COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. A WAIVER OF THE RIGHT TO BRING A REPRESENTATIVE ACTION UNDER PAGA IS UNENFORCEABLE (SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC. V. SUPERIOR COURT (2015) 234 CAL.APP.4TH 1109; MONTANO V. THE WET SEAL RETAIL (2015) 232 CAL.APP.4TH 1214.) BASED ON THE PLAIN LANGUAGE OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT, THERE IS NO AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE IF THE WAIVER IS UNENFORCEABLE. DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO DISTINGUISH SECURITAS AND MONTANO LACK MERIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JUDGE KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Petition To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Dismiss Plaintiff Gardenia Zuniga-Haros Class Claims And Stay All Civil Court Proceedings Pending The Completion Of Arbitration;
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Mussig of Sheppard Mulling LLP telephone number 213-617-5558 for Defendant BCBG.
Kyle Nordrehaug of Blumenthal, Nordrehaug & Bhowmik telephone number 858-551-1223 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Gardenia Zuniga- Haro.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BCBG MAX AZRIA GROUP, LLC'S Petition To Compel Individual Arbitration And To Dismiss Plaintiff Gardenia Zuniga-Haros Class Claims And Stay All Civil Court Proceedings Pending The Completion Of Arbitration is denied in its entirety. A waiver of the right to bring a representative action under PAGA is unenforceable (Securitas Security Services USA, Inc. v. Superior Court (2015) 234 Cal.App.4th 1109; Montano v. The Wet Seal Retail (2015) 232 Cal.App.4th 1214.) Based on the plain language of the parties' agreement, there is no agreement to arbitrate if the waiver is unenforceable. Defendant's efforts to distinguish Securitas and Montano lack merit. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
